def solve(nums, k)
  sorted = nums.sort
  n = sorted.length
  max_len = 1
  for left in 0...n do
    target = sorted[left] * k
    low = left
    high = n - 1
    best = left - 1

      else
        high = mid - 1
      end
    end
    current_len = best - left + 1
    max_len = [max_len, current_len].max
  end
  return n - max_len
end
